entry.title: Re: Limit warehouse order for PI document
entry.content:
"In that case, if you have 2 PI documents with 10 st. bins each, it will create one WO for both PI."

What I see in the screenshot is that one WO always has 5 items. 

So the filter works - but I see that is actually not the filter you want.

You wrote "Our target is when activating the PI documents, to have one WO per PI document."

So the max / min number of items is not the correct limit.

So the question is if one of the available fields in the "Field to Limit Warehouse Order Size" is one you can use?

Maybe document id works?

Otherwise the F1 help to this field describes which BAdI can be used to define your own filter field.

Brgds

Juerge4n

entry.title: Re: Sap analytics cloud reset all presentation filters
entry.content:
Hello, Someone has an idea ? I added with scrip Table.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter(XXXX) but it doesn't work.

I still didn't find how to reset filters (presentation) 

thanks

entry.title: Re: setup salary packaging with different PF earningg persentages of salary packaging
entry.content: Tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Human Resources is not correct here

entry.title: MyInbox in the SAP Build Work Zone lists tasks, but does not display them.
entry.content:
I have subscribet to SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Workzone in the same Subaccount. 

On my Work Zone Site i added the Process Trigger and MyInbox component. The Process Trigger works fine but MyInbox isn't working correctly. It lists the assigend Task of an User on the left menue but nothing happens when i click on them to work on the forms.

I created an Destination on the subaccount für SAP Build Process Automation in preparation for MyInbox on Work Zone.

 

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition

entry.title: Hierarchy upload from S/4 publich cloud to BW4H
entry.content:
Hi experts

We are using CDS view IFIGLACCOUNTHN, GL Accounts Hierarchy Nodes, to upload hierarchies from S4H Cloud.

We are using a customer InfoObject BGGLACC instead of 0GL_Account. The field routine has been defined as follows:

   IF source_fields_3 = '0HIER_NODE'.
      result = '0HIER_NODE'.
    ELSE.
      result = 'BGGLACC'.
    ENDIF.

While loading data into BW we get this error:

The text information for hierarchy nodes are mantained in the source system.

Where is the error?

Many Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I’m truly grateful for the opportunity that the SAP Digital Skills Initiative provides. Coming from a background where opportunities in technology have been limited, I resonate with some of the categories highlighted for this initiative:

  • As a first-generation college student, navigating the complexities of education and career development has been both challenging and rewarding.
  • Now, as someone looking to transition their career mid-life, I am deeply motivated to continue growing and learning, with SAP as my focus.

I’ve recently completed my learning journey on implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Sales fundamental business processes, and I am eagerly awaiting the chance to take my certification exam. For me, this initiative is more than just a certification — it’s a chance to prove to myself and others that it’s never too late to follow your passion and strive for something greater.

Thank you for this incredible opportunity and for supporting those of us on this journey of transformation. I look forward to taking the next steps.

Best regards,
Ali Ahmed Khan

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I’m truly grateful for the opportunity that the SAP Digital Skills Initiative provides. Coming from a background where opportunities in technology have been limited, I resonate with some of the categories highlighted for this initiative:

  • As a first-generation college student, navigating the complexities of education and career development has been both challenging and rewarding.
  • Now, as someone looking to transition their career mid-life, I am deeply motivated to continue growing and learning, with SAP as my focus.

I’ve recently completed my learning journey on implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Sales fundamental business processes, and I am eagerly awaiting the chance to take my certification exam. For me, this initiative is more than just a certification — it’s a chance to prove to myself and others that it’s never too late to follow your passion and strive for something greater.

Thank you for this incredible opportunity and for supporting those of us on this journey of transformation. I look forward to taking the next steps.

Best regards,
Ali Ahmed Khan

entry.title: Re: SAP COURSE

So we provide for numerous SAP product learning materials.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: SAP CPI unable to transfer data using message mapping
entry.content:
Hi All , 

I am trying to pass data from a xml schema to another schema(ORDER05) using message mapping. 

Two of the components of the structure E1EDKA1 are not getting populated . Can you please help me in pointing to the right direction . Apologies ahead if it is something already discussed before and I am not able to grasp it as I am new to Integration Suite . 

Below are the screen shots of the mapping in MMAP artifact.

Mapping Picture

 

Mapping expression

Test data ( As you can see the field stras does not even appear on the test output side; while changing the mapping to a constant it does )

 Also attaching the XSD files from both left to right side of schemas.

entry.title: Sub-processes Linking in solution processes
entry.content:
Hi there,
I have the problem that it is not clear to me how to link BPMN diagrams to my subprocesses. As you can see in the picture, I always get the message that no diagram is assigned. I also don't know how to add a diagram. This problem exists in the Solution Process Flow tab.
It would be great if someone could tell me where to store sub-processes so that they are displayed when I want to open the sub-process.

 

SAP Cloud ALM

entry.title: Re: Custom Tasks in Onboarding and Offboarding
entry.content:
Hi thanks for the blog post 🙂
We have a custom ONB task that collects clothing sizes from the onboardee - is there a way to trigger a simple story report to run once completed? - which would then be notified to a certain group of people?
We initially wanted an email output but were told this is not possible ?

thanks Darren

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content: I am Ali Ahmed Khan. I’ve completed the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Sales learning journey and am preparing for my certification. I’m excited to grow within the SAP ecosystem and grateful for this opportunity.

entry.title: Re: Value Help Dialog starts disabled ui5
entry.content:
Hi, you need to set RangeKeyFields,like:
oValueHelpDialog.setRangeKeyFields([{ label: "Product", key: "Product" }]);

entry.title: Re: Value Help Dialog starts disabled ui5
entry.content:
Hi, you need to set RangeKeyFields,like:
oValueHelpDialog.setRangeKeyFields([{ label: "Product", key: "Product" }]);

entry.title: Re: CultureNotFoundException
entry.content: and what if you are not allowed by company policy to change the region settings. We have this issue now on Windows 11

entry.title: SAPUI5 uploadSet: Items not getting refreshed after upload
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

I've implemented UploadSet and the files are getting uploaded as expected. But items are not getting refreshed after successful upload. 

 

onUploadCompleted: function (oEvent) {
                var oUploadSet = this.byId("uploadSet");
                oUploadSet.removeAllIncompleteItems();
                oUploadSet.getBinding("items").refresh();
            },
 
There are no errors while debugging.
 

<upload:UploadSet id="uploadSet" instantUpload="false" uploadEnabled="true" afterItemAdded="onAfterItemAdded" uploadCompleted="onUploadCompleted" items="{filteredModel>/items}">

                                    <upload:toolbar />

                                    <upload:items>

                                        <upload:UploadSetItem id="_IDGenUploadSetItem1" fileName="{filteredModel>fileName}" mediaType="{filteredModel>mediaType}" enabledEdit="false" visibleEdit="false" url="{filteredModel>url}" removePressed="onRemovePressed">

                                            <upload:attributes>

                                                <ObjectAttribute id="_IDGenObjectAttribute" title="Uploaded By" text="{filteredModel>createdBy}" active="false" />

                                                <ObjectAttribute id="_IDGenObjectAttribute1" title="Uploaded on" text="{filteredModel>createdAt}" active="false" />

                                                <ObjectAttribute id="_IDGenObjectAttribute2" title="File Size" text="{filteredModel>size}" active="false" />

                                            </upload:attributes>

                                        </upload:UploadSetItem>

                                    </upload:items>

                                </upload:UploadSet>

 

Here I've used JSON model(filteredModel) because the forms entity has 1 to many relationship with the files entity. Hence I'm filtering out the data based on form_id.

 

If I refresh the whole page, I'm getting the expected output.

 

Best regards,

Adarsh

entry.title: Re: Missing "Transactions and Applications" search provid...
entry.content:
For some reason, the "Transactions and Applications" search just out of nowhere some days after the upgrade. 
No cause (configuration change or something) apparent.

entry.title: Re: General data type in xlsx file from SAP Analytics Cloud dashboard
entry.content: Hi, we are seeing the same issue - it started sometime btw September 12th and 23rd.

entry.title: Capacity Availability Field Does not Available
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

We have a question, so we try to connect the production with the plant maintenance. So when the work center under maintenance order, the production order won't be able to be created or there are any warning message.

We already following the step on this link : https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/block-production-work-center-during-maintenance-order/qaq-p/7739061

But our issue are , we cannot find the field for capacity availability check in SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition. 

This is the picture from old SAP :

And this one is from SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition :

Any suggestion that we need to try?

Thank You!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: How does edoc_cockpit generate an XML?
entry.content: I'm trying to identify how the XML was built by the edoc_cockpit

entry.title: Pricing error in item Message no. VF073
entry.content:
Hello.

I get this error in a cancellation invoice that contains only 1 line, a variant configured material and due to this error I have no FI document for it..

I checked all 3 documents: SO, sales invoice and cancellation invoice and they look identical at the pricing procedure level - same number of lines and values, all of the pricing conditions have green traffic light and also all the conditions are within the validity time range.

The pricing procedure has only 1 mandatory condition that was not determined in any document due to requirement not being fulfilled.

I'm not able understand what is wrong here but I'm looking forward to receiving guidance from you, thank you.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
ui5-datetime-picker in value help dialogue for filter group item
entry.content:
I have a filter group containing filter items, and I am attempting to create a value help dialog that includes a DateTime picker. However, I’m only seeing a simple text input field instead of the DateTime picker icon.

 

 

worklist.xml

 

...
<fb:FilterGroupItem name="UpdatedOn" label="Last Update On" groupName="TicketFilterGroup" visibleInFilterBar="true">
	<fb:control>
	<MultiInput
		id="c4cUpdatedOn"
		valueHelpOnly="true"
		width="60%"
		valueHelpRequest=".onUpdatedOnVHRequested"/>
	</fb:control>
</fb:FilterGroupItem>
...

 

controller.js

 

sap.ui.define([
...
	'sap/ui/model/type/DateTime'
...
], function (TypeDateTime) {
	"use strict";
...
onUpdatedOnVHRequested: function() {
	this.loadFragment({
		name: "my.tickets.view.fragment.ValueHelpDialogUpdatedOn"
	}).then(function(oUpdatedOnDialog) {
		this._oUpdatedOnDialog = oUpdatedOnDialog;
		oUpdatedOnDialog.setRangeKeyFields([{
			label: "Last Update On",
			key: "UpdatedOn",
			type: 'datetime',
			typeInstance: new TypeDateTime(
				{
					//pattern: 'yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss'
					//showDate: 'true',
					//showTime: 'true',
					//showTimezone: 'true',
					UTC: 'true',
					style: 'medium'
					//calendarType: "Gregorian", 
				},
				{
					//isDateOnly: 'false',
					//displayFormat: 'DateTime'
				}
			)
		}]);
		oUpdatedOnDialog.setTokens(this._oUpdatedOnMultiInput.getTokens());
		oUpdatedOnDialog.open();
	}.bind(this));
},
onUpdatedOnValueHelpOkPress: function (oEvent) {
	var aTokens = oEvent.getParameter("tokens");
	this._oUpdatedOnMultiInput.setTokens(aTokens);
	this._oUpdatedOnDialog.close();
},
onUpdatedOnCancelPress: function () {
	this._oUpdatedOnDialog.close();
},
onUpdatedOnAfterClose: function () {
	this._oUpdatedOnDialog.destroy();
}
...

 

fragment.xml

 

<core:FragmentDefinition
	xmlns="sap.ui.comp.valuehelpdialog"
	xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
	xmlns:m="sap.m">
	<ValueHelpDialog
		title="Last Updated On"
		ok=".onUpdatedOnValueHelpOkPress"
		cancel=".onUpdatedOnCancelPress"
		key="UpdatedOn"
		descriptionKey="UpdatedOn"
		afterClose=".onUpdatedOnAfterClose"
		supportRanges="true"
		supportRangesOnly="true"
		maxIncludeRanges="1"
		maxExcludeRanges="0"
		maxConditions="1"
		>
</ValueHelpDialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

 

When I attempted to use just Date or Time (with type: 'date' or type: 'time' in .setRangeKeyFields), it worked without any issues.

My issue maybe close to the https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/fiori-list-report-adding-datepicker-value-help/qaq-p/12420664

But there are still no helps... 😞

SAP Fiori Elements SAPUI5 JavaScript

entry.title: What is the best ERP for a Startup?
entry.content: There are ERPs for large enterprises and SMBs. What about Startups? Are there ERPs specifically targeted towards startups that want to grow exponentially?

entry.title: Re: New 2H 2024 SAP Successfactors Time (Tracking) Features
entry.content:
Hi @Volker_Ruof ,

 

many thanks, not only for this release update blog but also for all your efforts in the past in providing us the latest updates in your way 🙂

This release really closes many Gaps and no-gos from customers I had, with the monthly timesheet, time statement, approval cockpit and, of course, the business rules. I look forward to undoing some workaround processes and configurations we did in the past to provide a better experience for the end users.

Once again, thank you and all the best!

Marius

entry.title: Re: Create Delivery and PGI of this delivery using BAPI
entry.content:
@smrutiCould you please help me to complete the process.

SAP STO to delivery order created through API. After creation of delivery similar way need to re update the  LGORT and PIKMG through API using BAPI.

I create a custom BAPI where BDC recorded for vl02n. Its take 15 entries after that its give a error.

Field LIPS-LGORT (16) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV50A
Field LIPSD-G_LFIMG (16) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV50A
Field LIPSD-PIKMG (16) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV50A
Field LIPS-LGORT (17) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV50A
Field LIPSD-G_LFIMG (17) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV50A
Field LIPSD-PIKMG (17) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV50A
Field LIPS-LGORT (18) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV50A
Field LIPSD-G_LFIMG (18) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV50A
Field LIPSD-PIKMG (18) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV50A

Field LIPSD-G_LFIMG (19) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV50A
Field LIPSD-PIKMG (19) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV50A
Field LIPS-LGORT (20) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV50A
Field LIPSD-G_LFIMG (20) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV50A
Field LIPSD-PIKMG (20) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV50A
Field LIPS-LGORT (21) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV50A
Field LIPSD-G_LFIMG (21) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV50A
Field LIPSD-PIKMG (21) does not exist in dynpro SAPMV50A.

How I will cover come from it. Please guided me.

entry.title: Re: Data append from one database to another
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: How can we create handling unit for inbound deliverie...
entry.content:
Hi,

The creation of handling units for inbound deliveries is part of the 4MM (Handling Unit Management) scope item. You can find more information in SAP Signavio Process Navigator under https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2408/SolP/4MM. 

Further information is available on the SAP Help Portal, in the Delivery Management documentation (see Packing | SAP Help Portal) and the Handling Unit Management documentation (see Packing in Deliveries | SAP Help Portal).

Best regards,
Tanja

entry.title: Ho to create a Testuser for RAP App in BTP?
entry.content:
Hi experts! 

is there any tutorial on how to create a testuser for testing roles and authorization of a RAP App? I haven't found any.

I tried to create a new user in BTP Subaccount and assigned some roles (I don't know which roles are needed) and created a user in the App "Manage Business Users" with the same email-address in the Dashboard of the ABAP Environment. I haven't received any "welcome" email Note: The email-Address is not linked to a SAP Account. my previous attempts have all failed.

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Data Migration Demystified: Legacy System Migration Workbench vs. SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit
entry.content:
@FrankFinkbohner,

While this is an excellent write-up and comparison of LSMW and SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit, I think it sends a conflicting message in the context of SAP S/4HANA usage, especially when it comes from an SAP employee and Product and Topic Expert.  On the one hand the official SAP position on LSMW that "the tool is not recommended and at the user's own responsibility. Esp. as there is no further support or new functionality released for this tool" is stated, while also expressing and opinion that "It is not forbidden to use the LSMW in SAP S/4HANA".  This opens the door for justification to continue to use LSMW, especially for operational mass data loads in SAP S/4HANA when this is not the intent of the tool, and not consistent with SAP's clean core principles.

Perhaps it is time to recognise that the "L" for "Legacy" in LSMW also means the LSMW tool itself is now legacy and more modern approaches to data loads should be considered instead.

entry.title: Re: Kickstart SAP TechEd 2024 with Autonomous Finance and Maximize Your Business Efficiency
entry.content: Good information. : Nice Blog 🙂

entry.title: Re: How can i adjust the HU_LABEL in the public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Patrick,

you can find a detailed process description on the SAP Help Portal under How to Create and Use a Custom Form Template in Handling Unit Management | SAP Help Portal.

Best regards,
Tanja

entry.title: Re: Formatted Search PO Screen
entry.content:
Hi,
Statement 
SELECT T0."U_AIS_Print_PO_Rev" from OCRD T0 where T0."CardCode"=$[$4.0.0] - this says no data found
-or-
SELECT T0."U_AIS_Print_PO_Rev" from OCRD T0 where T0."CardCode"=$[$4.0.1] - this says no data found

I get the same result
SELECT T0."U_AIS_Print_PO_Rev" from OCRD T0 where T0."CardCode"='*RSRC*ButtonCloseBox'
@LoHa @SonTran

entry.title: Re: SAP S4HC - How to download Payment advice XML data?
entry.content:
In Manage Payment media App you can see the files created.
The format may be like XX_CGI_XML_CT defined in the payment method.
You can download it or copy the standard format to adjust as your needs.


Kind Regards,

Lucy

entry.title: Re: Seamless planning integration between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere - product FAQ
entry.content:
Hi @Sebastian_Gesiarz ,

In the first release, you need to load data into the SAP Analytics Cloud using the known methods.

On the one hand side, we are indeed planning a distinct connection type for SAP Datasphere. However, I think this will be a secondary option in the context of seamless planning. The reason is that we are already working on live data access to fact data available in the space that the SAP Analytics Cloud model is deployed in.

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 uploadSet: Items not getting refreshed after u...
entry.content:
Hello @adarsh-kmr ,
Try this,

onUploadCompleted: function (oEvent) {
this.getView().getModel("filteredModel").setProperty("/items",[]);
var oUploadSet = this.byId("uploadSet");
oUploadSet.removeAllIncompleteItems(true);
oUploadSet.removeAllItems(true);
},

It will clear your upload set attachment which you added locally.

Regards,
Shubham

entry.title: Re: How and where do you start a consulting career in SAP?
entry.content:
@David_Chaviano ,

Thank you for the opportunity to express my interest in this great program. I got my SAP certification last year, got a job this year, but I lost my job after returning from my maternity leave. As a single mother with a background in Finance and a Master's degree, this will be a great opportunity for the next chapter of my professional career. I am cognizant, interest and specific about this program as it will leverage my career. This is very high on my list, and I believe this program strength fit with my future goal. I want to be an SAP expert, able to understand the business requirements and translate them into SAP solutions.

Thank you and I am looking forward to being part of the program.

However we just want message M8194 to show as pop up message & not all messages. Also we use Fiori more than GUI so this solution won't work for us.

Regards

Pankaj

I want to be an SAP expert, able to understand the business requirements and translate them into SAP solutions.

Thank you and I am looking forward to being part of the program.

entry.title: Re: Seamless planning integration between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere - product FAQ
entry.content:
@Max_Gander Thank you, does a known method mean that even though the data will be on the same DSP tenant, we will need to use OData from the DSP model to load the data to the SAC model? 

As for the future scenario, if the live data access from other DSP models sharing the same space will be available for the SAC, how will this data be added to the SAC planning model hosted in the same space?

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI unable to transfer data using message mapping
entry.content:
Your simulated input does not match your XSD schema for the input - "address1" does not equal "address_1".

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Warsaw 2024 – Key Highlights, Insights, and Community Feedback
entry.content:
On September 21, 2024, another edition of SAP Inside Track Warsaw  took place, and KMD Poland once again hosted us at their office. Around 50 participants attended, seizing the opportunity to join inspiring presentations, network with peers, and learn more about the latest SAP trends and tools.

 

Engaging Presentations and Diverse Topics

During SITWAW, several sessions led by experts were held, covering both technical and strategic aspects of SAP solutions. The presentations were designed to provide practical insights, case studies, and the chance to explore modern tools. Here are some of the key sessions:

  • SAP Signavio Process Transformation Suite: This presentation was one of the highlights of the event. Participants had the opportunity to discover the full potential of SAP Signavio in business process transformation, which was particularly appreciated for its practical use cases.

 

  • AI Revolution: Redefining Software Contracts & Licenses: Presented by Vitalij and Nora, this session focused on the revolution of AI in managing software licenses and contracts. Attendees valued this topic for its innovative approach and explanation of how artificial intelligence is transforming software management.

 

  • SAPUI5 2.x: Participants were introduced to the upcoming features of SAPUI5 2.0, which offer improvements in user interface development, making the process faster and more efficient.

 

  • AI Capabilities of SAP BTP: The presentation on artificial intelligence within the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) turned out to be another highlight of the event. The speakers showcased the built-in AI tools on SAP BTP, discussing how these technologies can be leveraged in business processes to accelerate automation and improve operational efficiency.

  • Embracing ISA-M: A Holistic Approach to Integration: A session dedicated to strategies for integrating complex systems using the ISA-M framework, with a focus on a holistic approach to digital transformation.

 

Participant Feedback: What They Loved and What Could Be Improved

Overall, the feedback from participants was very positive, with most ratings at 5/5. Here are the key aspects that were particularly appreciated:

  • Atmosphere and Networking: Participants appreciated the friendly and inclusive atmosphere, highlighting excellent networking opportunities. The event was full of energy, with plenty of time for exchanging ideas and experiences.

  • Relevance of Topics: Several participants mentioned that the presentations were very relevant to their work, especially the technical deep dives into SAP tools. Presentations such as Vitalij and Nora’s AI session, the SAP Signavio session, and DevOps were frequently cited as highlights.

In terms of suggestions for improvement, the following points were raised:

  • Venue Considerations: Some participants noted that the second room was less comfortable for presentations. There were also suggestions to slightly reduce the amount of food served during breakfast.

  • More Practical Content: Some attendees expressed interest in seeing more real-life implementation case studies and more advanced technical content.

What's Next for SAP Inside Track Warsaw?

The majority of participants expressed their willingness to join future editions, with many stating they would return as attendees, and some even as speakers. One key factor that would attract them to future events is the promise of interesting and relevant topics that keep pace with the rapidly evolving SAP technology landscape.

 

Thank you to our sponsors: KMD Polska, EPAM, AVOTechs, and SAPPress – your support made this event possible. Thank you to our presenters for sharing your knowledge and making the event so engaging.
And a big thanks to all our participants for being part of this event and providing such valuable feedback.

Looking forward to seeing you at the next event! 🥳🚀

 

Looking for presentations? You can find them here. 

Any questions? Contact sapinsidetrackwarszawa@gmail.com

entry.title: Outbound connection to SAP S/4 system from BTP
entry.content: Do we have an option to implement Oauth authentication while integrating BTP with SAP S/4 On prem system as a destination system

entry.title: Re: Request to host SAP CodeJam at SAP Labs Bulgaria (Sofia)
entry.content: I'm sorry but we don't do requests for custom topics. The only available topics for CodeJams are listed here:SAP CodeJam Topics - SAP Community

entry.title: How to enforce a maximum of 100 of rating in a goal plan with MLT (metric lookup table) ?
entry.content:
Hi, 

We have configured a goal plan with MLT but I can't find out how to enforce a limitation of 100 for this rating. How to do so ? The code below is in the goal plan but doesn't block rating to 100.

<auto-population field="rating" mode="auto" calc-type="col">
<rule>
<calculated-result calculator-id="GM_MLT_BASED_RATING_CALCULATOR"/>
</rule>
</auto-population>

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - Visual Cloud Functions - "RBAC: acce...
entry.content:
I reproduced on trial in US10 and it still worked for me.

Can you show more of the headers of the preview, and maybe the request URL?

If I don't allow permission and make it so it gives me the same 403 error, it's similar to what you have but different.

entry.title: Change the file name of a Custom Form Template PDF (SAP Business ByDesign)
entry.content:
For SAP Business ByDesign I have created a PDI solution with a custom form template that is based on a custom business object.

The Form Template Header description defined in SAP Cloud Applications Studio is passed as the PDF name when I preview the form.

 

 

How can I change the file name of the PDF? I want to it to be my business object instance ID.

I would assume that this setting must be done in the .xdp file in Adobe Lifecycle Designer.

 

 

 

SAP has defined such logic for Sales Order Confirmations so when I save an output Sales Order Confirmation the Sales Order ID is included in the file name.

 

any ideas?

entry.title: Re: Implico's Strategic Approach to Bottled Gas
entry.content: A strong argument for the implementation of Clean Core SAP standard solutions compared to self-developed or customized functional enhancements!

entry.title: Re: Everything you need to know about: SAP SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have some questions for you @RinkyKarthik :

1. is it possible to use standard library in SSF or can we upload the attributes manually?

2. is it possible to implement intelligent hub without using JPB?(new implementation)

3. in SSF, is there any standard library that we can find to enable TIH?

 

Waiting for you kindly feedback

entry.title: Re: Seamless planning integration between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere - product FAQ
entry.content:
@Sebastian_Gesiarz Yes, but as said, I hope this will change rather soon. 

In the future, you would be able to select a Datasphere fact table/view via data management in the SAP Analytics Cloud model and have the choice between live access and a copy/import of the data into the model.

entry.title: Re: CPILint version 1.0.2 is out
entry.content:
Hello Morten, 

I am trying to work with the CPI lint with the latest version 1.0.5. while I am trying to connect to the CPI tenant from the command prompt from the local machine, I am encountering the below error as API error when fetching editable packages. Also FYI, I have tried with the outside network but no lucks. please suggest.

 

Please advice on this. If there is any new blog related to this error or the latest version of the CPI lint. Please share here to understand better.

Hello Rayomi,

We can do at calculation sheet level itself.

entry.title: Re: # Switiching from Classis MRP(MD01/MD02) to MRP Live
entry.content:
Dear Prasanth,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Thanks for your reply.       

We are using custom reports which refers to std. tables MDKP, MDTB. Please refer SAP Note_ 2268085                                                                                               

So when we move to MRP Live, whether we need to migrate our old legacy data and where the new data will get stored. 

 

Thanks

entry.title: Attainment for Asset Management for Resource Scheduling S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello Friends

All steps properly followed for scheduling work in FIORI App Maintenance Scheduling Board: set up work center capacities, dispatch planned work orders and freeze schedule, confirm time and close. Attainment seems to be stuck at 0%. Calculation makes sense Attainment % = Work Completed as Planned / Work Planned * 100, advice?

-your SAP friends

entry.title: Re: Cost Estimate with Quantity Structure displays intern...
entry.content:
Hello Sridhar could you please check category of item M,E,G or something else if it is G overhead please check costing sheet used & rate maintained. You can navigate to costing sheet via OKKN by providing costing/Valuation variant.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: SAP automation licenses for UiPath robot
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Has anyone encountered process automation in the SAP system whith UiPath platform. I'm wondering which SAP licenses did you use for automation, all of automation will be executed through UI of SAP system? Is it possible to use standard SAP user license for UiPath robot?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: BEHAVIOR IN STATUS PROFILES IN SALES VA02:
entry.content:
Hi @carlosgomezp ,

To go back from READ to CANC, we need to first save the sales document in the DRAF after changing from READ.
Then again go to change mode and try now, we will be able to go to CANC from DRAF.

OR As mentioned above the BADI, can be used to get the required behavior.

Thanks and Regards,
Surya.

entry.title: Re: Can I get an SAP HANA public cloud system's training...
entry.content:
Hi @Psk3, 

We can access the SAP S4 HANA public cloud system trail edition for free.
But we will not be able to access the configurations, there will be pre delivered master data and transactional data which we can view and create new documents.

Trail system will only be provided to SAP partners and starter system incase a customer purchased SAP S4 HANA public cloud which can be used for POC and learning purposes.

Hope this helps!!!

Thanks and Regards,
Surya.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build App data connection with Odata Integration.
entry.content: Thank you. That issue is resolved now.

entry.title: Re: How to view and change the settlement profile for a p...
Re: Unable to Retrieve Organization Secret and User Secre...
entry.content: Thanks Adriana!

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 uploadSet: Items not getting refreshed after u...
entry.content:
You could try two things, either:

Rebind the model

 

onUploadCompleted: function (oEvent) {
    var oUploadSet = this.byId("uploadSet");
    oUploadSet.removeAllIncompleteItems();
    
    // Rebind the items to the model
    oUploadSet.bindItems({
        path: "filteredModel>/items",
        template: oUploadSet.getBindingInfo("items").template
    });
}

 

Or refresh the model a other way

 

onUploadCompleted: function (oEvent) {
    var oUploadSet = this.byId("uploadSet");
    oUploadSet.removeAllIncompleteItems();
    
    // Refresh the filteredModel directly
    var oModel = this.getView().getModel("filteredModel");
    oModel.refresh(true); // Force update
}

entry.title: Re: Settlement to AUC is showing wrong values
entry.content: The econd settlement period is the same of the settlement reversal? And the processing type?

entry.title: Re: Message VF 073 Pricing error in item 000001
entry.content:

I have an invoice plagued by this error, Message no. VF073, and have no idea what could be the case, I explained what I looked for HERE.

Some documentation explaining what is the program looking for would have certainly helped...

Thank you much for your reply.

entry.title: Re: Pricing error in item Message no. VF073
entry.content: Hi....Adding the requirement details would be helpful

entry.title: Re: How to find reasons cloud usage GB - S/4HANA Cloud HA...
Re: How to create SO10 standard text in S4HANA public clo...
entry.content:
Hello @gowthamigunji2000 

 

The App Maintain Standard Texts ( SO10N ) is available in S/4HANA Cloud 

 

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('SO10N')/S33

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Pricing error in item Message no. VF073
entry.content:
Hi @Kaitlin,

The requirement is used to check whether certain conditions are fulfilled in a pricing procedure.
Ex: Req 2 will check whether that particular line item;s item category is relevant for pricing, if it is relevant then the price will be calculated if not the condition will become inactive.

Kindly, check what that particular requirement checks and change the invoice value as required.
What is the requirement number used in your case?

Thanks and Regards,
Surya.

entry.title: Search Help to Custom Filter Field in "Manage Customer Line Items"
entry.content:
Hello @Andre_Fischer,

         I came across your reply to to one of the issues that I am facing and was wondering if you might be able to guide me on below. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/redefined-service-new-entityset-methods-did-not-get-created/qaq-p/11067796 

I am to make changes to "Manage Customer Line Items" OR FAR_CUSTOMER_LINE_ITEMS (Redefined) to accommodate custom field 'PARVW' OR 'Partner Function'. So far I have managed to

  1. add my custom field 'PARVW' to structure FAR_IFIARLINEITEM_EX.
  2. I was able to populate this field using method ITEMSET_GET_ENTITYSET. 

Now the problem :-

 After I added this field 'PARVW' to the filter, how do I provide the Search Help for the new custom field 'PARVW'? 

I tried to attach a search help H_TPAR to the new entity using  the solution I  found https://www.samplecodeabap.com/sap-segw-odata-mpc_ext-define-code-collection/ , but since this is a redefinition of standard service when I debug to check the newly added entity  cannot be accessed and since it cannot be accessed I cannot populate it.

Since it is allowed to add custom field to filters, I am hoping that there is probably a way to attach the search help to same. How can I get the filter to work for custom field 'PARVW'? 

Your help would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Restrict Sales order to Client Catalogs in SAP Retail
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are in the process of deploying SAP Retail in our company, and I would like to know can we manage the following requirement: A client should only be able to order materials from catalogs assigned to them. Here are the details:

  • A catalog contains different materials.
  • The catalog should be assigned to the customer.
  • A catalog can be assigned to multiple customers.
  • A customer can have multiple catalogs assigned.
  • A customer can order only materials listed in the catalogs assigned to them.

    Thank you very much for your help.

entry.title: Re: Pricing error in item Message no. VF073
entry.content:
Hello.

My pricing procedure has many conditions and most of them have requirements to be fulfilled.

If you read what I wrote then you know that none of the pricing conditions displays any red traffic light - in other words they seem to be OK - so please explain what exactly are you asking from me.

Thank you.

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: Dynamic programming fail: pass table TYPE cds as a parameter
entry.content:
Tested, you are right. It would not even compile, since reference is not an internal table which I could select data into.

What you suggest is working, but I would need to refactor the whole class. 🙂

The most important for me is that I understand the reason why it_table TYPE STANDARD TABLE of CDS_view_entity is not compatible with the CDS_view_entity, when passed as a parameter. It IS compatible, in fact, but there is no way to declare the target variable dynamically as a table, at least not any I know.

I am tempted to try with RTTS now, but I need to move on and I will select the data in the calling program. I will get back to this problem later, and if I find a simple solution, I will let you know.

Thank you for the discussion!

@danilo_apicella1 I do have the custom handler written in my code. But it is not triggered on the post call, I get the error before that itself.

I'm using CAP Java.

entry.content:
Hi on-call experts.

I'm encountering the following issue when trying to generate the app SAP&SAM_2205 using the program /MERP/CORE_CPMS_APPCREATE_PROG. 

I followed all the steps in the installation guide while configuring the program, filled in all the mandatory fields, but when I attempt to run the program, I get directed to a Short Dump, as shown in the image below:

When checking the error log in SMICM, I come across the following error:

Could someone help me solve this issue so that I can successfully generate the SSAM application?

Thanks in advance.

SAP Service and Asset Manager SAP Mobile Services

entry.title: Re: How to find reasons cloud usage GB - S/4HANA Cloud HA...
entry.content: Hi Jerry, thanks for the inputs. I tried to follow links shared by you but still there is lot of ambuigity.

entry.title: Re: User principal certificate from trustworthy issuer is...
entry.content:
I know there are two certificates involved in the Principal Propagation scenario:

  1. The certificate used during TLS handshake between SCC and SAP backend system. This is called "system certificate" in the SCC. It needs to have "special" permissions in the SAP system, as otherwise the SAP system won't allow the system represented by the certificate to "impersonate" multiple different users via temporary certificates (as in point 2).
  2. Possibly multiple short-lived end-user certificates, which are used for login.

I am not completely sure, but the message

Accept trusted forwarded certificate (received via HTTPS with trusted certificate): subject="CN=pieter@xxx.com", issuer="CN=sapcc, EMAIL=pieter@xxx.com"

is a bit unclear to me. Is this the "system certificate" that is used to establish a trust relationship between SCC and backend, or is this a "user certificate" that is supposed to be used for login? Could it be that the "CN=pieter" certificate is accidentally used for both? I know that a certificate that is defined as "system certificate" cannot at the same time be used as a "user certificate". (I.e. the settings in icm/trusted_reverse_proxy_<x> overrule the CERTRULE settings.) Perhaps this can be a reason, why the certificate is ignored in the CERTRULE mapping?!

Where to look next? It might help to activate the SSL/TLS trace in the SCC and check, which certificates are actually exchanged, both in the handshake as well as in the CLIENT_CERT header field.

entry.title: Re: Circular Table Join between KNA1 & KNVP
entry.content:
Hi @AdityaKapoor,

Add the KNA1 as an alias table(ZKAN1_1) and pass the KUNN2 = KUNNR in the new alias table ZKAN1_1 and take the required value.

Hope this helps!!!!

Thanks and Regards,
Surya.

entry.title: Remote Client copy without Personal data (PA Tables)
entry.content:
I want to do a remote client copy from production system to development system and need help choosing the copy profile.
I need to copy all data except the users and personal tables (PA*). 

(First I will start a user export with SAP_USER profile and import them after the remote client copy).

Can anyone tell me which profile I should use in this case?
Thanks!

entry.title: Fire of Innovations: Highlights from SAP TechEd 2024
entry.content:
The SAP TechEd 2024 event, themed “Fire of Innovations,” has once again set the stage for groundbreaking advancements in enterprise technology. Held virtually on October 8-9, this year’s conference showcased a plethora of new tools, updates, and strategies designed to empower businesses and developers alike. Here’s a deep dive into some of the most exciting announcements and innovations from the event.

1. Joule: The AI Copilot Revolution

One of the standout highlights was the unveiling of new capabilities for Joule, SAP’s generative AI copilot. Joule has been supercharged with collaborative AI agents that can perform complex, cross-disciplinary tasks. These agents are designed to break down silos within organizations, enhancing productivity and allowing human workers to focus on more creative and strategic activities.

For instance, in dispute management, autonomous AI agents can now analyze and resolve issues such as incorrect invoices or duplicate payments. In financial accounting, these agents streamline processes like bill payments and ledger updates, quickly addressing any inconsistencies.

2. SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) Enhancements

SAP continues to expand its Business Technology Platform (BTP), which is central to its cloud strategy. This year, SAP announced the expansion of BTP coverage through eight new SAP-managed data centers. Additionally, the SAP Discovery Center now offers a Quick-Account-Setup feature, enabling businesses to deploy specific use cases with just a click.

The integration of ABAP Cloud into SAP Build was another significant update. This integration allows developers to create and maintain ABAP Cloud projects directly from the SAP Build lobby, ensuring a seamless and efficient development process.

3. Innovations in SAP Build

SAP Build has been strengthened to support a “Clean Core” strategy, which is crucial for maintaining system consistency and upgradeability. The SAP Build Extensibility Wizard, introduced for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition, helps both key users and developers create on-stack and side-by-side extensions in an embedded experience.

4. Harnessing the Power of Data with SAP Knowledge Graph

SAP introduced the SAP Knowledge Graph, a next-generation solution that connects SAP data with rich business context. This tool is poised to help developers unlock the full value of SAP data, driving more informed decision-making and innovation.

5. Global Reach and Accessibility

This year’s SAP TechEd was a truly global event, with a free two-day virtual format that included keynotes, technical sessions, and developer enablement activities. The event was designed to be accessible to a worldwide audience, ensuring that everyone could benefit from the latest SAP innovations.

Conclusion

SAP TechEd 2024 has once again demonstrated SAP’s commitment to driving innovation and empowering businesses with cutting-edge technology. From AI advancements with Joule to enhancements in SAP BTP and SAP Build, the “Fire of Innovations” theme truly encapsulates the transformative potential of these new tools and strategies. As businesses continue to navigate the complexities of the digital age, SAP’s innovations provide a robust foundation for growth and success.

Stay tuned for more updates and insights from SAP TechEd as we continue to explore the future of enterprise technology.

Feel free to share your thoughts or ask any questions about the event! What innovation are you most excited about?

entry.title: Course Announcement
entry.content:
Hello and welcome to the SAP Learning MOOC “Putting AI Ethics into Practice at SAP”.
The course starts on Tuesday, November 12, 2024, and we hope you enjoy taking part.

These are the video lectures you can look forward to:

  • Introducing the Main Concepts: AI Ethics at SAP
  • Explaining SAP's Guidelines and Policy: SAP's Global AI Ethics Framework
  • Governing AI Ethics at SAP: From Policy to Practice
  • Understanding Ethical Boundaries: When AI Goes Too Far
  • Ensuring Explainability in HR AI Systems: Transparent Decisions
  • Ensuring Fairness in HR AI Systems: Discrimination-Free Decisions
  • Managing Standard AI Use Cases: Ethics in Everyday AI
  • Integrating our Policy in the AI Lifecycle: AI Ethics Operationalization

After you’ve completed the course, you can take a quiz and earn a Record of Achievement.

We can’t wait to see you here in the course discussion forum, where you can exchange ideas about the content with other learners and submit questions to the experts!
You can only do this until Tuesday, December 10, 2024, so don´t miss this great opportunity to interact with other participants.

Thank you for choosing SAP Learning!

Kind regards,
Britta Radicke-Schlinsog
(SAP Learning team)

entry.title: Re: How to create SO10 standard text in S4HANA public clo...
entry.content:
Hi

As was mentioned before, “Maintain Standard Texts” is the right place to do this.
Here is a more detailed guide on how to achieve this: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/s-4hana-cloud-managing-and-integrating-standard-text-in-sales-print/ba-p/13542593.

entry.title: Re: How to use standard text in labels in s4hana public c...
entry.content:
Hi

As was mentioned before, “Maintain Standard Texts” is the right place to do this.
Here is a more detailed guide on how to achieve this: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/s-4hana-cloud-managing-and-integrating-standard-text-in-sales-print/ba-p/13542593.

BR Serhii.

entry.title: Re: How to search Physical Stock in EWM Warehouse Monitor...
entry.content:
Hi 

We have another way 

Please check 

Go to transaction /SCWM/MON
Navigate to Stock and Bin -> Storage Bin
Enter the Storage Bin
Select option “Physical Stock”

If it works for you 

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: Integration between SAP Build App and SAP ERP
entry.content: Good morning! I am using SAP ECC and currently the application is ready, with the order entries being saved locally on the phone. However, I need these registered data to be submitted directly into a transaction in SAP. Is there a way to make this integration? Is there any tutorial available for this?
